title: cleisostoma ridleyi
intro: Cleisostoma ridleyi, also known as Ridley's Cleisostoma, is a species of orchid that belongs to the family Orchidaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Cleisostoma ridleyi include its ability to reduce fever, treat respiratory issues, and aid in wound healing. Cleisostoma ridleyi is typically prepared for medicinal use through infusions, decoctions, or extracts, which are often consumed as teas or taken in supplement form.
